title: Tripidium kanashiroi
taxonomy: Tripidium kanashiroi is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is native to South America and belongs to the genus Tripidium. The classification of this plant places it within the subfamily Pooideae and the tribe Cynodonteae. Further classification groups it in the order Poales and the class Liliopsida. This plant is considered an important part of its native ecosystem, providing habitat and food for various organisms.
